project.name: Sky's the Limit Painting
project.tagline: Next.js marketing site + lead gen with Agent OS enforcing truthful contractor claims and SEO compliance

nodes.label: Home / Landing
nodes.detail: Hero video, services overview, testimonials, and primary lead CTAs for Twin Cities painting contractor

nodes.label: Estimate Calculator
nodes.detail: Interactive room-by-room cost calculator with photo upload and intake form for qualified leads

nodes.label: Contact Form
nodes.detail: General inquiry form feeding into lead pipeline

nodes.label: Market Pages
nodes.detail: SEO landing pages for residential, commercial, public-sector with JSON-LD schema

nodes.label: Admin Console
nodes.detail: Protected internal view for managing leads and operations

nodes.label: Leads API Route
nodes.detail: Next.js API route processing all form submissions (estimate, contact, refer)

nodes.label: ManyChat Webhook
nodes.detail: Webhook endpoint for ManyChat chatbot events and lead data

nodes.label: Agent OS
nodes.detail: AI governance control plane: enforces POL claim guardrails (no false 'licensed/bonded' claims), verification loops (lint/test/build), SSOT, and Conventional Commits for all changes

nodes.label: Graphify
nodes.detail: Extracts, clusters, and queries a living graph of the full codebase for agent context, impact analysis, and dead-code detection

nodes.label: Codebase MCP Tools
nodes.detail: 14 MCP tools providing structured, graph-based codebase exploration and memory for agents (preferred over grep)

nodes.label: Claude
nodes.detail: Primary reasoning engine for Agent OS: policy interpretation, code editing, verification decisions, and claim accuracy checks

nodes.label: Gemini
nodes.detail: Powers graphify extract for semantic codebase mapping and relationship inference

nodes.label: Lead Pipeline Service
nodes.detail: Validates submissions, persists to DB, triggers notifications, and applies contractor-specific business rules

nodes.label: Email Service
nodes.detail: Sends transactional emails (lead confirmations, internal alerts) using Resend

nodes.label: SEO & Schema Engine
nodes.detail: Builds server-side JSON-LD (LocalBusiness, PaintingContractor, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList) and enforces Google Open Knowledge standards

nodes.label: Remotion Video Pipeline
nodes.detail: Code-as-video: generates hero animations and market-specific loops using React components rendered via Remotion

nodes.label: Directus CMS
nodes.detail: Headless CMS integration via @directus/sdk for flexible content management alongside Supabase

nodes.label: Supabase Postgres
nodes.detail: Primary persistent store for leads, estimate requests, auth users, and core business data

nodes.label: Supabase Storage
nodes.detail: Object storage for project photos, client uploads, and asset delivery with signed URLs

nodes.label: Vercel Platform
nodes.detail: Production hosting, preview deployments, Analytics, Speed Insights, and secure Cron invocations

nodes.label: Resend
nodes.detail: Transactional email provider powering all outbound notifications from lead pipeline

nodes.label: ManyChat
nodes.detail: Visual chatbot platform; webhook integration captures qualified leads from social messaging

nodes.label: Directus
nodes.detail: Open-source headless CMS used for content modeling and API-driven site sections

nodes.label: Google Ecosystem
nodes.detail: GA4 analytics, Rich Results testing, Search Console, and explicit allow-listing of AI crawlers (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, Gemini-Bot) + llms.txt

nodes.label: Formspree
nodes.detail: Form backend (FORMSPREE_FORM_ID) as fallback or parallel capture for some lead forms

nodes.label: Cal.com Scheduling
nodes.detail: Booking calendar integration (feature-flagged) for estimate consultations and follow-ups
